description_long: This object is a freestanding arched gate set into a patch of uneven, rocky terrain with patches of moss and grass. The gate consists of two vertical stone pillars supporting a curved stone arch, with glowing blue runic symbols embedded at the base and apex of the arch. The stonework appears weathered and ancient, with a slightly rough texture and visible seams between the blocks. The ground beneath and around the gate is irregular, featuring scattered rocks and a small stream or water feature running through the terrain. The blue runes give the gate a mystical or magical appearance, suggesting it may serve as a portal or ceremonial entryway. The structure is open in the center, allowing passage through the arch.
description: A stone arched gate with glowing blue runes, set on a rocky, mossy terrain with scattered stones and a small stream. The gate has an ancient, mystical appearance and is open for passage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arch, both stone pillars, and the glowing blue runes clearly visible on the gate.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the arch and the uneven, rocky terrain beneath the gate.
description_view_2: Rear view of the gate, displaying the arch from behind and the runes on the opposite side, with more visible rocks and water features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the arch's thickness and the terrain's slope and scattered stones.
attribute_surrounding_structure: stone pillars set in rocky, mossy terrain
